title: Sun and Moon Origin
description: This is a custom datapack for Minecraft's Origin Mod. Works on the latest version of the mod. If you find any bugs contact me on discord as stonedgoldfish#5648
body:
![Sun&Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b74843e64d97e85b53fe377a67167535064de40b.png)
# DISCONTINUED!!! CLICK THIS LINK 
[https://modrinth.com/datapack/sgoc](https://modrinth.com/datapack/sgoc)
# Sun and Moon // Astral Humanoid
This is a custom datapack for the Origins mod for Minecraft. **No dependencies required other than Origins itself.** If you'd like, you may install **FabricTailor** to have a skin related to this origin automatically equipped. Purely optional
## Installation Guide 

Simply install the datapack and insert it in the datapacks folder! **No need to unzip!**

## Wiki

### **_Origin description_**
The sun and moon directly influence the power you are able to project towards other entities. Gain fiery offensive powers from the sun to burn anything or ethereal defensive capabilities from the moon to survive a dangerous night
###  _Abilities_
**Absorbent**
When directly under the sun or moon your respective energy bar charges up slowly. While having a certain energy bar filled up, in the presence of the opposite astral body you will slowly start to lose energy. As it charges you become more powerful, however as your power grows too much you start suffering dangerous side effects

**SUN**
0%-9% Nothing happens
10%-25% Gain Speed I and Strength I

26%-50% Punches have a 30% chance to light mobs on fire, gain Speed II and take 50% less damage from fire

51%-75% Punches have a 100% chance to light mobs on fire, gain Strength II, take 100% less damage from fire

76%-99% Take 50% less damage from all sources. Mobs around you catch fire instantly and there is a small chance you create a ring of fire around you randomly. Gain Speed III and Strength III. Become immune to Weakness, Slowness and Mining Fatigue

100% (Danger Zone) Mobs lit on fire die instantly, have a constant ring of fire around you burning everything without control. After 30 seconds you explode and die

**MOON**
0%-9% Nothing happens

10%-25% Gain Resistance I and Health Boost I

26%-50% Getting punched has a 30% chance to apply Slowness and Darkness to the attacker and gain Resistance II

51%-75% Getting punched has a 100% chance to apply Slowness and Darkness to the attacker, gain Health Boost II and Night Vision

76%-99% Deal 50% more damage. Every few moments there is a chance you get Darkness and Slowness applied to you. Gain Resistance III and Health Boost III. Become immune to Weakness, Poison and Mining Fatigue

100% (Danger Zone) Gain Resistance IV and Absorption IV. You are constantly slowed and blinded. After 30 seconds you get dragged down to the void where you disintegrate and die

_When your energy is 0 for too long you get applied Nausea, Slowness and Poison. This process takes 5 minutes_

**Astral Insulators**

By holding a sunflower/ender pearl in either your mainhand or offhand you can negate the energy loss over time when in the presence of the opposite astral body.

**Fire Manipulation**

Use primary to shoot a fire ball (1% drain), and press primary while sneaking to create a fire explosion (5% drain)

**Liberate**

Use secondary to release energy to prevent yourself from overheating.

**Ethereal Form**

Use primary to turn into a black cloud, avoiding all damage and being able to phase through objects with enough space (i.e Doors) (1% drain/second)

**Dark Mist**

Use secondary to apply slowness and darkness to mobs in a 10 block radius (10% drain)

**Dimensional Vicissitude**

When entering the nether or void, your energy goes down to 0 instantly. As time passes you will begin to hear noises, lose health, unable to break blocks and take more damage. After 10 minutes you die instantly

**Atuu's Power**

You can craft Atuu's Token following the recipe below. With this item in hand you will not lose energy when using abilities. You can also travel to other dimensions without losing energy but you will still suffer the negative effects and die after 10 minutes.

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe3c66ccb76a20e24535549a8b21a56f321ec5e.png)
